# OTC&Me

> Pharmacist-built AI assistant that helps people choose safer over-the-counter medicine based on their personal health profile, conditions, allergies, and current prescriptions.

OTC&Me lets you describe a symptom or scan an OTC product and returns profile-aware recommendations with plain-language safety reasoning. Available in English and Simplified Chinese.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Active health profile dashboard and entry point to the symptom and safety tools.
- [Symptom check](/symptom): Describe symptoms by voice or text and get recommended OTC categories tailored to your profile.
- [Medication safety check](/safety): Type or photograph an OTC product to check whether it is safe for your conditions, allergies, and current prescriptions.
- [Set up your profile](/onboarding): Create a personal health profile (conditions, allergies, prescriptions, lifestyle) used to personalize recommendations.
- [Wishlist](/wishlist): Saved OTC medications and nearby pharmacy availability.
